rounds: Two weeks of holding the line on routine — that's not nothing, that's actually discipline wearing a boring outfit. But the Apollo ring moment? Colleague asked, you had a perfect opening, and you shut it down. The half-naked man on your finger did not get his moment.
pattern: They're fine with the costume, terrified of the explanation.
focus: One stranger gets a real answer this week — doesn't have to be the ring, just something true.
